nodes.name: Every 30 Minutes
nodes.notes: Checks for appointments needing 24h and 1h reminders.

parameters.query:
SELECT
  a.id AS appointment_id,
  a.calcom_booking_uid,
  a.start_time,
  a.timezone,
  c.phone_number,
  c.name AS customer_name,
  c.language_preference,
  s.name AS service_name,
  st.name AS staff_name,
  a.reminder_sent
FROM appointments a
JOIN customers c ON a.customer_id = c.id
JOIN services s ON a.service_id = s.id
JOIN staff st ON a.staff_id = st.id
WHERE
  a.status = 'confirmed'
  AND a.reminder_sent = false
  AND (
    -- 24-hour reminder window
    (a.start_time BETWEEN NOW() + INTERVAL '23 hours' AND NOW() + INTERVAL '25 hours')
    OR
    -- 1-hour reminder window
    (a.start_time BETWEEN NOW() + INTERVAL '55 minutes' AND NOW() + INTERVAL '65 minutes')
  )

nodes.name: Query Upcoming Appointments
nodes.notes: Finds confirmed appointments in 24h and 1h reminder windows

nodes.name: Mark Reminder Sent
nodes.notes: Prevents duplicate reminders by setting reminder_sent=true
